name: Proto-Koreanic (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Koreanic is the reconstructed common ancestor of the Koreanic family (Korean and Jeju). It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Lee, K.-M. & Ramsey, S. R.
sources.title: A History of the Korean Language
sources.notes: Reference for Koreanic history (structural node only).
